title: Cover all installed Python AlgoChat agent integrations in the verified migration
description: Cover all installed Python AlgoChat agent integrations in the verified migration
no_spec_change_rationale: This change records lifecycle coverage for the already-installed agent integration files after they became meaningful paths; it does not change the AlgoChat protocol, canonical contract, source, tests, or public API.
